metadata.description: Local marketplace for re-verifying Claude Code plugin findings

plugins.name: verifier
plugins.description: Probe plugin for re-verifying findings recorded in research.md

plugins.name: verifier-violator
plugins.description: Companion plugin used to trigger validator errors (probes 02 and 20)

plugins.name: cowork-env-probe
plugins.description: Minimal env-propagation probe (plugin-level / frontmatter / body) for CLI vs Cowork comparison

plugins.name: cowork-block-probe
plugins.description: Skill-to-skill PreToolUse:Skill block test for CLI vs Cowork

plugins.name: cowork-expansion-probe
plugins.description: top-level vs bash -c shell expansion test for CLI vs Cowork

plugins.name: cowork-presub-probe
plugins.description: CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT pre-substitution test (top-level vs bash -c) for CLI vs Cowork

plugins.name: fm-presub-probe
plugins.description: Frontmatter hook pre-sub vs shell-exp test (CLI-only)

plugins.name: cowork-fs-probe
plugins.description: hook(host) vs Bash tool(VM) filesystem isolation test

plugins.name: cowork-userconfig-probe
plugins.description: userConfig sensitive x required combination test

plugins.name: cowork-surface-probe
plugins.description: Isolate which SessionStart hook command form fails to surface on Cowork

plugins.name: cowork-blockmethods-probe
plugins.description: PreToolUse block-method matrix (decision/permissionDecision/exit2) CLI vs Cowork

plugins.name: cowork-mp-script-probe
plugins.description: Tests ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/script.sh launch in plugin-level SessionStart hook. Designed to be installed via the Cowork GUI marketplace flow (not zip upload) and compared against zip-upload baseline.

plugins.name: cowork-mp-disambig-probe
plugins.description: Disambiguator probe. Adds double-quote and $HOME observation points to settle whether Cowork hook command runtime is (a) shell-bypassed launcher or (b) bash -c with $-escape + path-prefix pre-sub.

plugins.name: cowork-fm-bashblock-probe
plugins.description: Proves whether a skill frontmatter PreToolUse:Bash hook fires on Cowork by emitting only a block decision (no echo). Mac re-verification of frontmatter hook behavior.

plugins.name: cowork-bodypath-probe
plugins.description: Tests skill-body ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} substitution value on Mac Cowork, whether the VM Bash tool can use it, and whether the Read tool can read a bundled file at that host path (article section 3).

plugins.name: cowork-exec-form-probe
plugins.description: Tests hook command exec form (args present) on Cowork: whether ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} resolves to a real path via launcher text pre-substitution vs env-var export, where shell form (§2.1/§2.2) failed both.
